title: Words By The Water Presents Fringe And Friends
description: Words by the Water presents: Fringe and Friends After the success of the last Words by the Water and friends, we're back and we're doing it bigger and better. Ella Sadie Guthrie will be bringing her new sequence of poetry focusing on the dreamlike nature of Grief. The incomparable Kate Ireland will be launching her new book 'Adaptive Strategies for a Sensitive System' fresh off her tour supporting Joshua Idehen. Elle Dillon-Reams will be bringing snippets from her show MEAT as well as other soft and beautiful words to woo us with. Gray Taylor will be supporting with some wonderful spoken word All while the beloved illustrator Chris Riddell (Ottoline books, The Observer) will be making their words come to life. Drinks and Merch from all involved will be able to purchase at the Rooftop Bar. Doors at 6:30 for drinks, merch and mingling Show will start at 7:15pm and will include an interval Show will end at 9pm
